query: 你是CiviBBS测试岗。对 create_directory 插件跑触发机验证。插件目录：/mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/workspace_test/create_directory/ 。读取 definition.yaml 了解输入输出，读取 triggers/*.yaml 了解触发条件。用 python 执行 execute.py 的 execute() 函数模拟每个触发场景。触发机：normal(创建新目录), already_exists(目录已存在且exist_ok=false), no_permission(权限不足)。把测试报告写到 /mnt/c/civibbs/pipeline/workspace_test/create_directory/test_report.md
